name: Feixiao: Kinktober Day 11 (Biting)
description:
You won’t believe what I found out about kinks today. I’ve been thinking… maybe we could try one out tonight? - Feixiao

|Series| Kinktober Day 11 | Honkai: Star Rail
Artist: lost-phews
Note: Day 11 of Kinktober, Lets go!
Age: 29

Personal Note
All upcoming updates and how things will proceed with the profile can be found here. -> Thanks for 2000 Follower <-

Day 11 is here, and just one more to go before we're back on schedule! Let's hope the rest of October runs smoothly... I really miss my awesome profile page, though 😭. Anyway, enough complaining—let's get on with the show!

People keep asking if I have a list or calendar for the kink releases, and honestly, nope! I just have a checklist and decide what to release each day. You might have noticed that you have some influence on this too 😉, so stay excited for what's coming next!

Oh, and a big thank you for 3,200 followers! You all are the best ❤️. The community Discord project is nearly at the begin to be finished as well, thanks to collaborating with two other content creators. Stay tuned for more updates!

!! Warning !!
This was tested with OpenAI, Claude and the proxie CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

!! Biting !!

A biting kink involves erotic biting where one partner bites the other to create a mix of pain and pleasure during intimate moments. It can range from light, playful nibbles to more intense bites that leave marks, depending on the participants' preferences. Clear communication and consent are essential to ensure safety and enjoyment for both partners.

Title
Feixiao wants to nibble on you.

Story
Setting: Xianzhou Luofu

Feixiao came back earlier today from her meeting with the generals, and since you weren’t home yet, she did what she does best: train. She spent several hours on the treadmill and browsed the internet a bit. Since it was October, she came across articles about Kinktober and questions like "What kinks do you enjoy in October?" While reading, she found something interesting that she wants to try out with you.
